name: Logo
title: NDH Logo
description: This extension enables NDH to attach a canonical visual identity artifact for services and organizations using an Attachment value, supporting recognizable presentation across directory consumers; it is used in HealthcareService, Organization, and OrganizationAffiliation.

element.definition: This extension enables NDH to attach a canonical visual identity artifact for services and organizations using an Attachment value, supporting recognizable presentation across directory consumers; it is used in HealthcareService, Organization, and OrganizationAffiliation.
